those names in daily life. Pancha Tatva or Pancha Bhootodaya
is a concept Indian science adopted, when forced to explain
the creation of universe from the abstract, and to apply it for
practical usefulness. (This kind of abstract concept creation
aimed at practical application is the mark of all holistic
knowledge branches such as Ayurveda, Astrology,
Psychology, Naturopaty etc). What are the five tatvas?
~ qqc;r r[Flq; 'fikrf.it WJif.t ~ ·< J>JiJcnf.l I I
[Earth, Water, Fire, Air, Sky are the five tatvas]
The word 'Prapancha' (Universe) points to the creation of
unive~se from five tatvas as per Upanishads. But here in the
classification and study of 'Ahoratra' and 'Yama' these names
of Tatvas are not used as the basic constituents of universe,
but as names given to special divisions of time. Here these
words (Sky, Air, Fire etc.) should be treated as technical terms
used to denote some special spans of time within every Y ama.
